reviews.review_title: Can’t fly and fire weapons at same time
reviews.review_description: Seems like a neat game. But other space combat games are so much more intuitive. How are you suppose to fire weapons if you need both thumbs to fly the ship? This could easily be fixed by having triggers fire weapons. Instead of triggers controlling throttle. But I can’t see in game how to customize controls. Only invert them.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, I've approached the controls so that you're not limited to steer with your gaze like many other titles. Unfortunately not all bluetooth controllers have analog triggers so it made me decide between weapons and controls and I'm not a fan of auto-throttle so I had to make room for thrusters. You can adjust stud controls from the cockpit buttons on the back but not configure weapons. Check out my other free game that is a sequel for this title. There's two paths in the game, other starts if you pick up the weapon after waking up inside the ship and trigger alarm. Main story on the other hand  begins if you talk to the Cpt.

reviews.review_description: Brill but could do with some tips

developer_response.body: Feel free to email sampsa@refinereality.com I'm glad to help.

reviews.review_title: I can carry only one container a time.
reviews.review_description: He saved my Life and soul.Praise Jesus!

developer_response.body:
Take containers one by one into the hangars landing spot. 
Craft can only carry one container in its bay at once. Have fun :)

reviews.review_title: Cool game but bad bug on Go [SOLVED]
reviews.review_description:
On Oculus Go, all of the explosions or impacts' sprites make the game glitch or lag but differently for each eyes' images (the left image can glitch but not the right one or vice versa) which is really bad for motion sickness. To bad because beside this the game looks awesome but I can't play it like this... To bad...
[Update] Bug gone ! The Dev has patched the game and has resolved the problem I have described previously. So five stars for an awesome open world fps (gamepad only)
I can’t give this game anymore Stars. As it refuses to even download. Would love to play what I paid for.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that.  Try to get a decent wifi connection to download it, if install phase gets stuck there's not much apart from factory reset you can do (it's possible to uninstall through PC and android data bridge(adb) but it's a lot of work installing android sdk etc.). If it doesnt't work at all request a refund through oculus customer service. Thanks for letting me know.

reviews.review_description: I love that I can free roam, the controls for the ship drives me a little crazy. The right stick doesn't roll like it states. I cannot go over the speed of 3 unless I hold my x button while holding throttle than let go of x and my speed jumps to 13 and drops right back down to 3. So it takes forever to get to the first ship and impossible to keep up with it to protect it from the enemies that fly in. My S6 over heats quite quickly. Can someone explain how to go faster than 3 and keep the speed fast? Other than that the graphics are awesome.  I want to play this game more but I will not play until I can get some help on how to go faster.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, If you look to the back of the craft you´ll see switches. with 4 backmost buttons you can alter your crafts controls. They are displayed with those colorful dots in the loading screen, apart from that you can inspect them holding X-button as you gaze them so you´ll get the idea what each button means. You can invert studs and invert the axis also, find a combination that suits you, game will remember your settings.  
  To go faster closer to your seat on your left there´s the ROAM-button,  de-activate that to (red) and you´ll get the full speed, just remember to use ROAM-mode (green) while indoors or take it really easy.
 Overheating is a issue that can only be addressed by cooling down the device between sessions. Back in 2016 game was performing really well but some regression happened inside game engine so everything was done to get the game running even as well as it´s running now. Sorry for the inconvinience. Just email   sampsa@refinereality.com   for more info and thanks for playing my game!

reviews.review_description:
Using S8 and Steel Series XL.

First off I will say the concept of this is awesome and appeals to be greatly however there are some things that need to be fixed please.

The start screen causes double vision on the S8 and do some scenes in space for example - the fire explosions. This causes glitching an double vision.

The controls for space craft need work.

The yaw axis is way too slow 
The invert axis sometimes work and sometimes don't 
Also please explain the other settings while in the ship

Would be nice to assign functions to switches ourselves as I would use yaw and pitch on right stick and roll on the other 

please fix these issues and I will update review


update

tried to play after update and unfortunately I feel it still needs a lot of polishing 

there is still double vision at some points and it seems now like the frames per second at worse than before

The ship controls still feel awkward .

developer_response.body: Update 1.2 solves some of issues with S8 but not completely.
